question.content: Calculate the circumference of a circle with radius 3

functions.name: geometry.circumference
functions.description: Calculate the circumference of a circle given the radius.

units.description: Units for the output circumference measurement. Default is 'cm'.

question.content: Get the recipe for vegan chocolate cake including the steps for preparation.

functions.name: get_recipe
functions.description: Fetch the recipe for a specific dish along with preparation steps.

dish_name.description: Name of the dish whose recipe needs to be fetched.

diet_preference.description: Preferred dietary consideration like vegan, vegetarian, gluten-free etc. Default is none.

question.content: How many veterans were there in the United States in the year 1954?

functions.name: get_bureau_statistics
functions.description: Retrieve statistical data for a specific year and statistical category

year.description: The year for which to retrieve the statistical data

category.description: The statistical category (e.g., employment, crime, health)

functions.name: get_population
functions.description: Retrieve population data for a specific year and population category

year.description: The year for which to retrieve the population data

category.description: The population category (e.g., total, veterans, women)

functions.name: get_demographics
functions.description: Retrieve demographic data for a specific year and demographic category

year.description: The year for which to retrieve the demographic data

category.description: The demographic category (e.g., gender, race, age)

question.content: Calculate the cell density in a sample with an optical density of 0.6, where the experiment dilution is 5 times.

functions.name: calculate_cell_density
functions.description: Calculate the cell density of a biological sample based on its optical density and the experiment dilution.

optical_density.description: The optical density of the sample, usually obtained from a spectrophotometer reading.

dilution.description: The dilution factor applied during the experiment.

calibration_factor.description: The calibration factor to adjust the density, default value is 1e9 assuming cell density is in CFU/mL.

question.content: Calculate the derivative of the function 2x^2 at x = 1.

functions.name: calculus.derivative
functions.description: Compute the derivative of a function at a specific value.

function.description: The function to calculate the derivative of.

value.description: The value where the derivative needs to be calculated at.

function_variable.description: The variable present in the function, for instance x or y, etc. Default is 'x'.

question.content: "In a physics experiment, you are given two charges. The first charge is 5 coulombs and is placed at a distance of 2 meters from the point where the electric field is being measured. The second charge is 3 coulombs and is placed at a distance of 4 meters from the same point. The experiment is conducted in a vacuum. Can you calculate the electric field produced by each charge at the point of measurement by invoking the 'calculate_electric_field' function?"

functions.name: calculate_electric_field
functions.description: Calculate the electric field produced by a charge at a certain distance.

charge.description: Charge in coulombs producing the electric field.

distance.description: Distance from the charge in meters where the field is being measured.

permitivity.description: Permitivity of the space where field is being calculated, default is for vacuum.

question.content: Get me a list of available vegetarian and gluten-free foods at the Walmart near Denver.

functions.name: safeway.vegan_products
functions.description: Get available vegan products at specified Safeway store

location.description: City and state where the Safeway store is located, e.g. Denver, CO

categories.description: Product categories to search within. Default empty array

functions.name: wholefoods.vegan_products
functions.description: Get available vegan products at specified Whole Foods store

location.description: City and state where the Whole Foods store is located, e.g. Denver, CO

categories.description: Product categories to search within. Default empty array

functions.name: walmart.vegan_products
functions.description: Get available vegan products at specified Walmart store

location.description: City and state where the Walmart store is located, e.g. Denver, CO

categories.description: Product categories to search within. Default empty array

question.content: "In the game 'Animal Crossing', I am interested in collecting bugs during the 'Summer' season. Could you help me find out what bugs are available during this time? Also, in the same game, I would like to know what fish can be collected in the 'Winter' season. On a completely different note, I am studying genetics and I came across a SNP mutation with the ID 'rs53576'. Can you tell me what type of mutation this is in the species 'Homo sapiens'? Lastly, I also found another SNP mutation with the ID 'rs1800497'. Could you help me find out what type of mutation this is in the species 'Mus musculus'?"

functions.name: mutation_type.find
functions.description: Finds the type of a genetic mutation based on its SNP (Single Nucleotide Polymorphism) ID.

snp_id.description: The ID of the Single Nucleotide Polymorphism (SNP) mutation.

species.description: Species in which the SNP occurs, default is 'Homo sapiens' (Humans).

functions.name: get_collectables_in_season
functions.description: Retrieve a list of collectable items in a specific game during a specified season.

season.description: The season for which to retrieve the collectable items.

item_type.description: The type of item to search for. Default is 'all'. Possible values: 'all', 'bug', 'fish', 'sea creatures', etc.

question.content: Find me the number of active players in the game 'World of Warcraft' in 2020.

functions.name: video_games.get_player_count
functions.description: Retrieves the number of active players for a specified video game and year.

game_title.description: The title of the video game.

functions.name: video_games.get_sales
functions.description: Retrieves the sales figures for a specified video game and year.

game_title.description: The title of the video game.

question.content: Find the probability of getting exactly 5 heads in 10 fair coin tosses.

functions.name: prob_dist.binomial
functions.description: Compute the probability of having 'success' outcome from binomial distribution.

p.description: The probability of success on any given trial, defaults to 0.5

question.content: Can I find a good cooking recipe for apple pie using less than 5 ingredients?

functions.name: restaurant.find
functions.description: Locate restaurants based on specific criteria such as cuisine and price range

price.description: Price range of the restaurant in format ['low', 'mid', 'high']. Default ['low', 'mid', 'high']

functions.name: recipe.find
functions.description: Locate cooking recipes based on specific criteria such as main ingredient and number of ingredients

ingredientLimit.description: Max number of ingredients the recipe should use.

question.content: Find the boiling point and melting point of water under the sea level of 5000m.

functions.name: get_boiling_melting_points
functions.description: Retrieve the boiling point and melting point of a substance based on its name and the sea level.

question.content: "John is working on a project where he needs to calculate the area of two right-angled triangles. The first triangle has a base of 12 meters and a height of 15 meters. The second triangle has a base of 18 meters and a height of 24 meters. He wants to know the total area of these two triangles in square meters. Can you help him calculate this?"

functions.name: calculate_area
functions.description: Calculate the area of a right-angled triangle given the lengths of its base and height.

base.description: The length of the base of the right-angled triangle.

height.description: The height of the right-angled triangle.

unit.description: The unit of measure used. Defaults to cm.
